2000June 23, 2000

🇫🇷 Bordeaux, France

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Bordeaux, France, June 23, 2000 -- June 30, 2000

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2000-06-bordeaux-france

27 Resolutions

473Plenary
Endorse Howard Mason for position of Chair of SC 4
SC4 endorses the nomination by the United States of Howard Mason for the position of Chair of ISO/TC 184/SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
472Plenary
Remove Parts 26, 213, 313, 223, and 323 from Release 2
SC4 decides to remove Parts 26, 213 and 313, and 223 and 323 from the list of parts planned for Release 2 of ISO 10303.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
471Plenary
Extend liaison with ISO/TC 10 and nominate Alain Bezos
SC4 extends its existing liaison between SC4 and ISO/TC 10/SC 1 to cover all ISO/TC 10 activities related to the scope of SC4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
470Plenary
Extend liaison with ISO/TC 29/WG 34 and nominate Norman Swindells
SC4 extends its existing liaison between SC4/WG 2 and ISO/TC 29/WG 34 to cover all SC4 activities.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
469Plenary
Update policy for development and publication of test cases and abstract test suites
SC4 cancels its resolutions #168, #169, #257, and #278 and establishes the following policy for development and publication of test cases and abstract test suites.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
468Plenary
Split EXPRESS to OMG XMI binding into new Part 25
SC4 resolves that the development of a mapping of EXPRESS into the physical meta-model of UML enabling OMG XMI use shall be removed from Part 28 and published as a new part and as a Draft Technical...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
467Plenary
Process ISO 10303-28 as a Technical Specification
SC4 confirms the decision of the Part 28 Project to process ISO 10303-28 as a Technical Specification, instead of as a Committee Draft as specified in the NWI Proposal. This TS is expected to be re...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
466Plenary
Approve V. Srinivasan as two-way liaison officer with ISO/TC 213
SC4 approves the nomination of V. Srinivasan of ISO/TC 184 as two-way liaison officer with ISO/TC 213.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
465Plenary
Change title of ISO 15926
SC4 approves a change of name of ISO 15926 from "Integration of life-cycle data for oil and gas production facilities" to "Integration of life-cycle data for process plants including oil and gas pr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
464Plenary
Approve A-liaison with funStep Interest Group
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 approves the A-liaison with funStep Interest Group (FSIG), and appoints Mr. Ricardo Gonçalves (UNINOVA-Portugal) and Mr. Miguel Borras (AIDIMA -- Spain) as the liaison officers, and...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
463Plenary
Approve nomination of A. Bezos as liaison officer with ISO/TC 184/SC 5
SC4 approves the nomination of A. Bezos of ISO/TC 184/SC 4 as liaison officer with ISO/TC 184/SC 5.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
462Plenary
Create STEP Modules Harmonization Team in WG 10
A new team is proposed under WG 10 (with the expectation that it will move to the appropriate WG as STEP Modularization is adopted as a mainstream practice) called the "STEP Modules Harmonization T...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
461Plenary
Re-appoint Greg Paul as convener of WG 12
SC4 re-appoints Greg Paul as convener of WG 12 for a further 3-year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
460Plenary
Create Joint Working Group with ISO/TC 184/SC 5
SC4 endorses the proposal itemized below concerning the creation of a Joint working group with SC 5. * The SC4/WG 8 shall be transformed into a new Joint working group (JWG 8 - Manufacturing Proces...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
459Plenary
Establish process for adopting appropriate external specifications
SC4 requests the Secretariat to establish a process for adopting the appropriate specifications from outside ISO and IEC. These specifications shall be related to the ISO/TC 184/SC 4 scope and shou...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
458Plenary
Modify AP Guidelines to reflect mapping table specification changes
SC4 directs the Quality Committee to modify Guidelines for the development and approval of STEP application protocols to reflect the changes in the specification of mapping tables as documented in ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
457Plenary
Mandate ISO 8601 date format conformance for all SC 4 documents
SC4 resolves that all SC4-related documents, standards, and announcements shall conform to ISO 8601 (Data elements and interchange formats -- Information interchange -- Representation of dates and ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
456Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for ISO 10303 projects
SC4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC4 projects: |=== |Project |Project Leader |Project Editor |ISO 10303-24 |David Loffredo | |ISO 10303-214 |Ullr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to its former Chairman, Mr. Dick Wandmacher, for his leadership, patience, un-tiring dedication and brilliant leadership.

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to Sophie Clivio for taking time from her busy schedule to participate in our meeting and for her valuable guidance and support for the SC4 work.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to Jacques Pons for taking time from his busy schedule to participate in our meetings and for offering kind words during the welcome party.

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 wishes to express its appreciation to Greg Paul for his dedicated effort, attention to details, superb management of the organization and work of WG 12. He is also commended for his support of ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 wishes to expressed its appreciation to Gaylen Rinaudot for her years of service as the SOLIS administrator and for SC4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 express its appreciation for Tom Warren for his service as the Acting Chair of ISO/TC 184/SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
